raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta patti Weeta tappe no-
faukta Eṣkoles Uppe / ta Wiḣ-
nu-Kekkara deht / ko tee Israëta
Behrni no turrenes bija nogree-
sufchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz atgreeṣahs tee no
tahs Semmes Iṣluhkoṣchanas /
pehz tschetrdefinits Deenahin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee gahje / un nahze
pee Mohsus/ un pee Aâroxa/ un
pee wiffu Israëta Behrnu Drau-
Dsês/ Pahrana Tukfneſti us Kah-
desu/un tee atneffe wixxam / un
wiffat Draudsei Wehsit / un rah-
dija tohs Semmes Augtus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee teize wixxam un
fazzija: Mehs effam tai Semmê
nahkuschi/ kurp tu nuhs fuhtijis
effi / un pateefi ta tekk ar Peenu
un Meddu / un schis irr wixnas
Auglis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Res ween ka fiipri Lau-
dis tai Semmê dsihwo / un tee
Pilsfahti irr stipri/ un fohti leeli/
mehs effim tur arridsan Eenaka
Behrnus redsejufscht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee Amalekteri dsihwo
tai Semmê prett Deenas-Wid-
du / bet tee Getiteri/ un tee Jebu-
fiteri / un tee Amoriteri dsihwo
Kalnôs/ un tee Kananiteri dsihwo
pee Juhras/un Zardanas Mallâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad apfluuffinaja Kahlebs
tohs Landis preeksch Mohsu / un
fazzija: Eima tikkuschi augschop/
un eemantojam to / jo mehs to
teescham uhswarrefim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee Wiḣri / kas ar
winzu bija aisgahjufschi/ fazzija:
Mehs ne warram pretti fcheim
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Laudim eet / jo tee irr stipraki ni-
kâ mehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta likke tee weenu nikni
Stawu no tahs Semmes is-
paust / ko tee bija isluhfejuſcht
pee teem Israëta Behrneem/ faz-
zidami : Ta Semme/ ko meh-
effam pahrstaigajufschi to isluh-
koht/ irr weena Semme/ kas fa-
wus Eedsihwtajus norihj / u-
wifft Laudis/ ko mehs eeksch tah-
effam redsejufschi / irr Wiḣri ni-
leela Gaxxuma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Mehs effim tur arridsa
Milsu-Laudis redsejufschi / tob
Eenaka Dehnus / no teem Milsu-
Landim / mehs bijam fawâs Az-
zis itt ka Siffeni/un ta patt bijam
mehs winno Azzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XIV. Nodalla.
Lee Kaudis tizzeja wairaf teem Iṣluhkeem/ ne-
Kahlebam/furne prett Deewu/un gribb atpa-
kat us Egipti greestees : 1/4. Josuũs un Kah-
lebs cerunna teem / lairwini to ne darra: 5
Bet tee Laudis gribb tohs ar Akmineem ne-
mehtaht: 10. Pahr to apskaitahs Deew-
un gribb wiffu Draudsbu isdeldeht : 11
Bet Mohsus peeluhds to KUNGU: 13. Ta-
beedinia ka wiffuem Dumpineekem buhs Tu-
neſi nomirt: 29/36. Tee Israëta Behr-
kari o prett Amaleku bes Deewa Pawehlescha-
nas: 40. Untoyp apkauti: 45.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad zehlahs wiffa Drau-
dse / un pazchle faw-
Balkfui/ un tee Laudir-
randaja tai Nakti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiffi Israëta Behr-
kurneja prett Mohsu / nn pret-
Aâronn / un ta wiffa Drauds-
fazzija us teem: Kaut mehs E-
giptes-Semmê buhtuun nemir-
rufschi
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
